hooks.command: $payload = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($payload)) { exit 0 }; try { $event = $payload | ConvertFrom-Json -ErrorAction Stop } catch { exit 0 }; $filePath = $event.tool_input.file_path; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($filePath)) { exit 0 }; if ($filePath -notmatch '(^|[\\/])infrastructure([\\/]|$)') { exit 0 }; Push-Location infrastructure; try { terraform fmt -check -recursive; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 2 }; terraform init -backend=false -input=false; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 2 }; terraform validate; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 2 } } finally { Pop-Location }

$out = & make lint 2>&1; $rc = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($rc -ne 0) { $reason = "Phase 0 exit criteria failed (make lint exit=$rc). Fix lint errors before finishing turn:`n`n" + ($out -join "`n"); @{ decision = "block"; reason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }; exit 0
